title: Quote of the day by George Washington: "War: An act of violence whose object is to constrain the enemy, to accomplish our will."
summary_full: George Washington’s line explains war in plain terms. It is not about glory. It is about force used to make the other side accept your terms.
summary_public: George Washington’s line explains war in plain terms. It is not about glory. It is about force used to make the other side accept your terms.
